approval.approval_note: 2026-07-22 user instruction: playwright verification with stock 2308
approval.provider_calls_note: Bounded human-approved trial: 1 interactive page load + 2 CSV GETs, no other egress.

captures.raw_file_note: Stored gzip-compressed (685068 bytes, gz sha256:ae16eda9123f3814484fd1e7b9ef02ee6bd3dc2ca80fc99ed976d45ef876b288) to stay under the S9 release-hardening 2 MB artifact audit; recorded sha256 is of the uncompressed CSV, verified by decompressing.

interactive_check.title: 個股日成交資訊 - TWSE 臺灣證券交易所

probes.encoding: charset=ms950 declared; strict UTF-8 decode fails; CP950 decode succeeds for both captures.
probes.schema_stock_day: Header row 日期/成交股數/成交金額/開盤價/最高價/最低價/收盤價/漲跌價差/成交筆數/註記; daily rows 115/07/01 onward for 2308 台達電.
probes.schema_mi_index: 16-column 證券代號 header at line 313 matches option_c_endpoint_assessment.response_contract.full_market_columns exactly; 1083 four-digit securities; 2308 row present with complete OHLCV.

acceptance_notes: Trial capture was human-initiated and bounded; it does not activate P5 and does not flip the source contract out of source_contract_blocked.
MI_INDEX single-session payload is ~3.5 MB CSV (full market, incl. warrants/CBBC); per-session fixture size policy must account for this before the 750-session loop.
Encoding is confirmed ms950/CP950; the normalization pipeline must decode CP950, not UTF-8.
Raw CSVs are caller-owned external evidence under outputs/ (gitignored); no normalized fixture was admitted into the repository.
